name: Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot
preceding_figure_names: Basic Weave, Bounce Fallaway with Weave Ending, Closed Impetus and Feather Finish, Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot, Feather Step, Hover Cross, Hover Feather, Natural Hover Telemark, Natural Telemark, Natural Twist Turn, Natural Weave, Natural Zig-Zag from PP, Open Telemark and Feather Ending, Open Telemark, Natural Turn, Outside Swivel and Feather Ending, Reverse Turn, Top Spin, Weave from PP
following_figure_names: Change Of Direction, Hover Telemark, Reverse Wave, Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot, Basic Weave (At corner), Open Telemark and Feather Ending (At corner)
notes: Different timings that can be used on this figure: SQQS, SQQ&, SQ&Q, S&QQ, QQQQ. (S: 2 beats, Q: 1 beat, &: 1/2 beat) When this figure is danced into corner, start DW or LOD to follow with a Reverse figure, DC of new LOD. Depending on the previous alignment and choreography, e.g. if starting DW into corner, the 2nd step could be taken diagonal (instead of moving along LOD)

steps.action: RF back in Fallaway R side leading
LF back in CBMP and Fallaway
RF back, LF held in CBMP
steps.alignment: Backing DC, end facing LOD or DW

steps.action: LF back in Fallaway, L side leading
comments: Lady keeps her head to left

steps.action: RF back in CBMP and Fallaway (small step)
comments: Hips and body are both turning to L continuously

steps.action: LF fwd in CBMP, RF held in CBMP
